achievements.description: Win a duel within 5 turns and get the "Quick Finish" bonus

achievements.description: Win a duel on your opponents turn and get the "Opponent's Turn Win" bonus

achievements.title: Close Call
achievements.description: Win a duel with 101-1000 remaining and get the "Low LP" bonus
achievements.author: ZamArch

achievements.title: Survive and Conquer
achievements.description: Win a duel with 1-100 LP remaining and get the "Extremely Low LP" bonus
achievements.author: ZamArch

achievements.title: Untouchable
achievements.description: Win a duel without taking any damage and get the "No Damage" bonus
achievements.author: ZamArch

achievements.title: Legendary Endurance
achievements.description: Win a duel where you at some point reached 20000 LP and get the "Over 20000 LP" bonus
achievements.author: ZamArch

achievements.title: Heart of the Underdog
achievements.description: Win a duel where your opponent at some point had 5000 more LP than you and get the "LP Differential" bonus
achievements.author: ZamArch

achievements.title: Mathematician
achievements.description: Win a duel by having you opponent reach exactly 0 LP and get the "Exactly 0 LP" bonus
achievements.author: ZamArch

achievements.description: Win a duel where you summoned at least 3 Fusion Monster and get the "Fusion Summon" bonus

achievements.title: Level Up!

achievements.title: Deckless Dominance
achievements.description: Win a duel when having 0 cards left in your deck and get the "Empty Deck" bonus
achievements.author: ZamArch

achievements.title: Lady Luck
achievements.description: Win a duel where you had 3 successful coin tosses and get the "Luck" bonus
achievements.author: ZamArch

achievements.title: Dominating with Power
achievements.description: Win a duel where you dealt at least 3000 damage in a single attack and get the "Max Damage" bonus
achievements.author: ZamArch

achievements.description: Win a duel by using Exodia and get the "Exodia Finish" bonus [4★+ Opponent]

achievements.title: Skull Servant Finish Bonus
achievements.description: Win a duel by having Skull Servant deal the final blow and get the "Skull Servant Finish" bonus [5★ Opponent]
achievements.author: ZamArch

achievements.title: Konami Bonus
achievements.description: Receive the Konami bonus by winning the Duel with exactly 5730 Life Points remaining
